framework_name: Canada PIPEDA — Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act

regime.regulator: Office of the Privacy Commissioner of Canada (OPC)
regime.notes: Based on 10 fair information principles derived from the CSA Privacy Code.

obligations.title: Accountability
obligations.description: Organization is responsible for personal information under its control; designate a privacy officer.

obligations.title: Identifying Purposes
obligations.description: Identify purposes for collecting personal information at or before collection.

obligations.title: Consent
obligations.description: Knowledge and consent required, subject to limited exceptions.

obligations.title: Limiting Collection
obligations.description: Collection limited to what is necessary for identified purposes.

obligations.title: Limiting Use, Disclosure, and Retention
obligations.description: Use and disclose only for identified purposes; retain only as long as necessary.

obligations.title: Accuracy
obligations.description: Keep information as accurate, complete, and up-to-date as necessary.

obligations.title: Safeguards
obligations.description: Safeguards appropriate to the sensitivity of the information.

obligations.title: Openness
obligations.description: Make policies and practices readily available.

obligations.title: Individual Access
obligations.description: Right of access to one's own information, subject to exceptions.

obligations.title: Challenging Compliance
obligations.description: Provide a mechanism to challenge compliance.

obligations.title: Breach reporting and record-keeping
obligations.description: Report breaches of security safeguards to Privacy Commissioner and affected individuals when there is real risk of significant harm.
